notice: Registry of authoritative source locations. It is not legal advice and does not turn demo thresholds into regulation. Compliance must re-check current consolidated texts before every production promotion.

sources.issuer: Quốc hội nước CHXHCN Việt Nam
sources.title: Luật Các tổ chức tín dụng số 32/2024/QH15
supports: legal governance context for credit institutions
does_not_support: demo PD, DTI, LTV or pricing thresholds

sources.issuer: Ngân hàng Nhà nước Việt Nam
sources.title: Văn bản hợp nhất 27/VBHN-NHNN về phân loại tài sản có

does_not_support: using application PD as an automatic legal approval decision

sources.issuer: Chính phủ nước CHXHCN Việt Nam
sources.title: Nghị định 13/2023/NĐ-CP về bảo vệ dữ liệu cá nhân

sources.title: Principles for the Management of Credit Risk
does_not_support: claiming Basel certification or regulatory approval for this model

sources.title: Follow-up report on the use of machine learning for IRB models
